raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX-wrote letter to credit card company customer service notifying them of fraudulent charges, requested removal of charges and account closure. 
XXXXphoned customer service department requesting help with resolving this matter. Customer service representative refused to assist me without a PIN number for the account - which I did not have - even though I had every other kind of account identification information associated with this account. Wrote letter again requesting removal of fraudulent charges, late fees, interest fees and account closure. 
XXXXthird letter written to credit card company requesting cancellation of fraudulent charges, late fees, interest charges and account closure.
